text: Subagent directory convention: All agent templates that are NOT top-level agents (Orchestrator, Stage, Ship, Auto-Tune, Auto-MergeInstall) should be stored in templates/agents/subagents/ rather than templates/agents/. This includes review personas, researchers, and any other leaf-executor or delegated agents. Update: (1) move existing non-top-level agent templates to templates/agents/subagents/, (2) update install-harness SKILL.md to install subagents to .github/agents/subagents/ in target workspaces, (3) update all cross-references in skills, instructions, and foundation docs that reference moved agents, (4) update verify_workspace.py if it checks agent paths, (5) update the dogfood self-install (.github/agents/) to match the new structure.
